title: Substrate smoke test: full lifecycle dry-run
description: Exercise the complete delegation lifecycle on a no-op payload to prove the substrate works end to end: claim T-000, acquire a lock on a scratch file, mark in_progress with a note, hand off to verifier, verdict done. No source changes required.
acceptance_criteria: a lock was acquired and released (or swept) with no residue in .harness/locks/
reputation counter bumped in state.json for the executing agent

notes.note: expected: full lifecycle transitions recorded; running dry-run payload
HANDOFF -> verifier: replay: blackboard.py show T-000 + tail events.jsonl; expected transitions all present
VERIFIED: events.jsonl shows claim->in_progress->handoff->done; lock cycle clean
